summary: Cycle U (21st overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-22) ran heartbeat after ~1h T gap. Both queues absent on disk for 21st consecutive cycle. regen-all clean: ALL CHECKS PASSED, round-trip 0 failures (24.2s elapsed). Cycle T's deferred WIP was resolved by Founder at 10b2cff2 between cycles T+U. Cycle U attempted commit including cycle T's deferred journal cleanup. RACE: Founder ran git commit -a at 23:05:03Z during cycle U's commit window — Founder's commit 0c06b8e1 (refactor home-hq AMD-027) absorbed all cycle U staged artifacts (T journal, U journal, wellness, last-verify, app-health regen) alongside Founder's own refactor work + 27 iter9 design-pass PNGs. Post-commit-hook then fired creating af01f8f2 cron(routine) that absorbed remaining telemetry artifacts. Net outcome: substrate fully forward, working tree clean (12 commits ahead of origin), no data loss. Deviation from runbook: mandated commit message format was NOT used — cycle U work landed under Founder's commit message instead. Follow-up commit with this addendum uses the runbook format for honest record-keeping. Metric-integrity post-race: HONEST — substrate state valid, race documented transparently in journal addendum, future cycles can reconstruct via git log.
founder_action_items: Cron cadence — now 21 empty-inbox fires/UTC date (was 20 at cycle T, 19 at S). Suggested remedy unchanged: add guard at Step 0 of overnight-triage prompt — exit clean if no motion in task-queue/founder/, escalations/inbox/, or bug-reports/inbox/ in last 3h AND regen-all last-pass < 60 min old. Would reduce nightly fires from ~24 to ~6-8.

**NEW (cycle U lesson):** Commit-race mitigation. When Founder runs `git commit -a` / `git add -A` during a cron cycle's commit window, the cron's staged artifacts get absorbed into Founder's commit (not the cron's runbook-mandated commit message). Recommended runbook patch: cron cycles should `git stash push -- <my-paths>` before attempting commit if Founder-presence signal appears mid-cycle (mixed-authorship staging detected via `git diff --cached --stat` showing src/, functions/, templates/ paths the cron did not author). This isolates cycle artifacts from Founder's staging area atomically.
